title: ATMIL - All The Mods I Love
description: A mix of all the great and underrated mods, contain various weapons and bosses. Basically an RPG modpack.
body:
# ATTENTION!
# -This modpack is still not 100% complete so there would be a change from time to time
> 
> 
> 
### ATMIL is adventure and RPG-style progression. Players can explore richer environments, encounter new challenges, and experience a more immersive world that rewards curiosity and exploration. Dungeons, improved combat systems, and expanded gear options make every journey feel more engaging.

For a better experience, consider installing resource packs such as:
- FreshAnimations / Reanimated Blue (overhaul mob animation)
- Ashen 16x / Alacrity (RPG vibe)
- Detailed Animations (player animation)
